title: Flintronic Heat Trivet, 3PCS 20cm Cork Trivet, 5mm Thick Round Cork Coaster, Multifunctional Heatproof Table Mat, Reusable Kitchen Hot Pads for Hot Pots, Pans, Kettles, Potted Plants
features: 【HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS】Cork mats are made of high-quality environmentally friendly cork, which has good flexibility and durability, can withstand certain pressure and friction, and is not easy to break.Heat-resistant and moisture-proof, very suitable for holding hot and cold drinks. Non-toxic and recyclable, environmentally friendly and lightweight.

【SPACE SAVING】The shape and flat design make this pot mat easy to store when not in use. Stack the pot mat with pots and pans to save kitchen space without causing clutter in the space. It is lightweight and can be punched or equipped with hooks to hang it on the wall hooks or storage racks in the kitchen.

【MULTIPLE FUNCTIONS】With excellent heat insulation performance, it can effectively block the heat transferred by hot pots, prevent the bottom of the pot from directly contacting the table and countertop, protect the tabletop from heat damage, and make you safer when cooking. Placed between pots to prevent scratches and extend the life of the stove. Used between glassware and ceramic products to avoid product breakage.

【REUSABLE POT PADS】The cork pads can protect your table from water stains and stains, reducing the water stains and stains left on the table and delicate surfaces. Reusable, just simple cleaning after use, such as gently wiping or hand washing with warm water, and then laying flat to dry. It can be put into use again, which is both environmentally friendly and economical.

【WIDELY USED】Great for stacking cookware, glassware, baking trays, pottery, ceramics, frying pans, bowls, plates, cups, etc., it is a must-have for saving kitchen space and protecting countertops. At the same time, these cork coasters can also be painted and created art, use your imagination to make homemade gifts for Christmas and birthdays for your loved ones.
description: Flintronic Pot Pan Protectors. - The pot holder is made of high-quality cork, which is flexible, durable, heat-resistant and moisture-proof, non-toxic, recyclable, environmentally friendly and lightweight. - Flat design, can be stacked with kitchen utensils, light weight and can be hung for storage. - Can be used for heat insulation, prevent heat damage to the desktop, prevent pots from scratching, protect glass and ceramic products, etc. - Reusable design, easy to clean, long service life, environmentally friendly and safe. - Can be used for cookware, baking trays, ceramics, pans, bowls, plates, etc., simple and generous, can be used as kitchen decorations. Specifications: Material: Cork Size: 20cm*5mm Color: As shown Packing list: 3* round cork pot holders If you have any questions, please feel free to send message and we will provide you with a satisfactory solution.
